description: PFS-OVERHAUL-006 follow-up: travel from Flame Crest (the closest Horde flight master to Blackrock Mountain) to each BRM dungeon/raid portal in the world. Used by tools/scripts/probe-routes.ps1, the BotRunner.Tests.LiveValidation.LongPathingTests.FlameCrestToBrmDungeonEntrance theory, and the WaypointGeneration Layer B suite.

routes.name: FlameCrestToBlackrockDepths
routes.description: Flame Crest (Horde flight master, Burning Steppes) to the BRD APPROACH position in Blackrock Mountain. The literal BRD portal at (-7179,-921,165) is in a cave tunnel that's not meshed by the current bake (BRM-interior bake hole, tile (45,33)). Target uses the closest bot-reachable approach on the BRM mountain surface above the cave entrance.

routes.name: FlameCrestToLowerBlackrockSpire
routes.description: Flame Crest to the LBRS instance portal at the upper-spire portal cluster. ~962y outdoor walk plus the vertical climb up the BRM spire.

routes.name: FlameCrestToUpperBlackrockSpire
routes.description: Flame Crest to the UBRS instance portal — adjacent to LBRS in the upper-spire portal cluster. ~955y outdoor walk plus the spire climb.

routes.name: FlameCrestToBlackwingLair
routes.description: Flame Crest to the BWL APPROACH position partway up Blackrock Spire, below UBRS. The literal BWL altar at (-7665,-1102,400) sits on an isolated polygon disconnected from the spire's main corridor (BRM-interior bake hole, tile (46,34)). Target uses the closest bot-reachable mid-spire approach.
